Decision flow

below.
// CALLS:   ErrorManager, CentralWarningLogger, CommandTracker; see §Helpers
//          in the plan for the specific Plantroom helper classes this calls.
// CALLED BY: ribbon / Bot execute_command or upstream orchestrator command
//            (see §CalledBy in plan).

using System;
using JetBrains.Annotations;
using Autodesk.Revit.Attributes;
using Autodesk.Revit.UI;
using Nice3point.Revit.Toolkit.External;
using MEPBridge.Revit.Tracking;
using MEPBridge.Revit.ErrorWiring;
using MEPBridge.Revit.WarningManager.Services;
using ErrorWire = MEPBridge.Revit.ErrorWiring.ErrorManager;

namespace MEPBridge.Revit.Plantroom.Commands
{
<summary>
PlantroomPlaceFamilyInstancesFromSolverResultInActiveDocumentCommand — see Features Plan §8 Plantroom bucket for full workflow.
</summary>
<precondition>See §Preconditions in plan.</precondition>
<postcondition>See §Outputs in plan.</postcondition>
<usecase>See §Why and §Bot/Human in plan.</usecase>
<notfor>Cross-cutting responsibilities outside this class's stated purpose.</notfor>
<keywords>plantroom, plantroomplacefamilyinstancesfromsolverresultinactivedocumentcommand</keywords>
<logictree>
1. Transaction open. 2. For each placement: `doc.Create.NewFamilyInstance(position, symbol, level, NonStructural)` then `ElementTransformUtils.RotateElement` for orientation. 3. Write audit shared params via `StampConfigAuditParametersOnPlacedFamily`. 4. Optionally draw detail-line clearance halos via `PlantroomDrawClearanceHalosAsDetailLinesCommand`. 5. Commit Transaction.
